description: Create one or more Hotspot vouchers.

requestBody.name: name
requestBody.description: Voucher note, duplicated across all generated vouchers

requestBody.name: authorizedGuestLimit
requestBody.description: (Optional) limit for how many different guests can use the same voucher to authorize network access

requestBody.name: timeLimitMinutes
requestBody.description: How long (in minutes) the voucher will provide access to the network since authorization of the first guest. Subsequently connected guests, if allowed, will share the same expiration time.

requestBody.name: rxRateLimitKbps
requestBody.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

requestBody.name: txRateLimitKbps
requestBody.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

children.name: name
children.description: Voucher note, may contain duplicate values across multiple vouchers

children.name: code
children.description: Secret code to active the voucher using the Hotspot portal

children.name: authorizedGuestLimit
children.description: (Optional) limit for how many different guests can use the same voucher to authorize network access

children.name: authorizedGuestCount
children.description: For how many guests the voucher has been used to authorize network access

children.name: activatedAt
children.description: (Optional) timestamp when the voucher has been activated (authorization time of the first guest)

children.name: expiresAt
children.description: (Optional) timestamp when the voucher will become expired. All guests using the voucher will be unauthorized from network access

children.name: expired
children.description: Whether the voucher has been expired and can no longer be used to authorize network access

children.name: timeLimitMinutes
children.description: How long (in minutes) the voucher will provide access to the network since authorization of the first guest. Subsequently connected guests, if allowed, will share the same expiration time.

children.name: rxRateLimitKbps
children.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

children.name: txRateLimitKbps
children.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

local.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = json.dumps({
  "count": 0,
  "name": "string",
  "authorizedGuestLimit": 1,
  "timeLimitMinutes": 0,
  "dataUsageLimitMBytes": 0,
  "rxRateLimitKbps": 0,
  "txRateLimitKbps": 0
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Generate Vouchers
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers"
    method: POST
    body:
      count: 0
      name: string
      authorizedGuestLimit: 1
      timeLimitMinutes: 0
      dataUsageLimitMBytes: 0
      rxRateLimitKbps: 0
      txRateLimitKbps: 0
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "count": 0,
  "name": "string",
  "authorizedGuestLimit": 1,
  "timeLimitMinutes": 0,
  "dataUsageLimitMBytes": 0,
  "rxRateLimitKbps": 0,
  "txRateLimitKbps": 0
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Generate Vouchers
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/hotspot/vouchers"
    method: POST
    body:
      count: 0
      name: string
      authorizedGuestLimit: 1
      timeLimitMinutes: 0
      dataUsageLimitMBytes: 0
      rxRateLimitKbps: 0
      txRateLimitKbps: 0
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
